response: DataFlow AI, a data infrastructure startup founded in 2022, has closed a Series A round, raising $8.5 million and valuing the company at $42 million. With an 18-person team, the firm boasts $120,000 in monthly recurring revenue (MRR) and a 25% month-over-month growth rate, and it is backed by investors Sequoia and Y Combinator (YC).
